heading: Permits or leases of certain lands in Okla­homa; retention of royalties
label: 233a Permits or leases of certain lands in Okla­homa; retention of royalties
text: The Secretary of the Interior is directed to retain in his custody until otherwise directed by law the 12½ per centum and other royalties heretofore or hereafter received by him in pursuance of section 233 of this title.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was repealed by , .Section 233 of this titleact June 22, 1948, ch. 605, § 362 Stat. 576
